title: draba reptans var. micrantha
intro: Draba reptans var. micrantha, also known as wild mustard or small-flowered whitlowgrass, is a plant species in the mustard family, characterized by its small white flowers and pungent aroma. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Draba reptans var. micrantha include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in natural remedies to promote overall well-being.
